lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Can't stop to talk. I have work to do.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Sorry, but I'm busy right now.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Here to do some mining? You're in the right place if so.

lines.speaker: Dwarf
lines.text: Hello, human. I can't talk right now I'm afraid. I have things to do.
